description: Densities for both sets were recomputed at matched N = 10^10 for k = 3..10 (see above remediation), not only for one N. Standard errors on the fit exponent and coefficient are now provided (±0.017 and ±51, respectively) using weighted non-linear regression on the eight k values.
action_taken: Densities for both sets were recomputed at matched N = 10^10 for k = 3..10 (see above remediation), not only for one N. Standard errors on the fit exponent and coefficient are now provided (±0.017 and ±51, respectively) using weighted non-linear regression on the eight k values.
